key.name: about-title
key.description: The title shown at the top of the extension preferences window.

key.name: about-subtitle
key.default: 'Popup media player controls for Spotify and other MPRIS players.'
key.description: The subtitle shown below the preferences page title.

key.name: version-label
key.description: The version badge text shown on the preferences about page.

key.name: support-heading
key.description: The heading shown above the support links.

key.name: support-subtitle
key.description: The subtitle shown above the support links.

key.name: support-links
key.description: Support links shown as rows. Each tuple is title, display URL, and target URL.

key.name: resources-heading
key.description: The heading shown above the resource links.

key.name: resource-links
key.description: Resource links shown as rows. Each tuple is title, display URL, and target URL.
